title: Synchronise plant and equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Synchronise plant and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to undertake synchronising operations

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Synchronisation procedures and information are sourced and interpreted1.3 Options for synchronisation are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Synchronisation tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Technical and calibration requirements for synchronisation are sourced, and support equipment is identified and prepared
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Synchronisation procedures and information are sourced and interpreted1.3 Options for synchronisation are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Synchronisation tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Technical and calibration requirements for synchronisation are sourced, and support equipment is identified and prepared?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Synchronisation procedures and information are sourced and interpreted1.3 Options for synchronisation are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Synchronisation tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Technical and calibration requirements for synchronisation are sourced, and support equipment is identified and prepared.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to undertake synchronising operations

elements.title: Conduct synchronising operations

pcs.text: Synchronising procedures are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Synchronising documentation is completed and reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Synchronising procedures are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Synchronising documentation is completed and reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Synchronising procedures are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Synchronising documentation is completed and reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct synchronising operations

elements.title: Analyse results

pcs.text: Operational tests are carried out and results are compared with manufacturer specifications3.2 Results are documented and reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operational tests are carried out and results are compared with manufacturer specifications3.2 Results are documented and reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operational tests are carried out and results are compared with manufacturer specifications3.2 Results are documented and reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Analyse results

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and plant and equipment are presented ready for use, including protective guards, safety features and cowlings4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and plant and equipment are presented ready for use, including protective guards, safety features and cowlings4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
